item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested refrigerator-side confirmation person, identifies the repeated pattern of prior manual gates after reagent, instrument, and waste-handling failures, reframes the issue as upstream process/system-control failure, and proposes freezing further manual patches and treating the incidents as one structural control problem. It does not provide the requested local manual-check implementation."}
